request.description:
## Doctor List using Chatbot

Fetches a filtered list of doctors available for appointment booking via the chatbot interface. Results can be narrowed by a keyword (e.g., speciality or doctor name) and limited to a specified number of records.

---

## Authentication

This endpoint requires a **Chatbot Token** passed as a custom request header.

| Header | Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `X-Chatbot-Token` | `<your_jwt_token>` | JWT-based authentication token issued for chatbot access. Must be included in every request. |

---

## Request Headers

| Header | Value | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `X-Chatbot-Token` | JWT token | ✅ Yes |
| `Content-Type` | `application/json` | ✅ Yes |

---

## Request Body

Send a JSON object with the following parameters:

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `keyword` | string | ✅ Yes | Search keyword to filter doctors (e.g., speciality name like `"medicine"`, or a doctor's name). |
| `limit` | integer | ✅ Yes | Maximum number of doctor records to return in the response. |

**Example:**
```json
{
  "keyword": "medicine",
  "limit": 5
}
```

---

## Response

### 200 OK

Returns a success response with a list of matching doctors.

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `success` | boolean | `true` if the request was processed successfully. |
| `message` | string | Human-readable status message (e.g., `"Chatbot doctor list fetched successfully"`). |
| `keyword` | string | The keyword used to filter the results, echoed back from the request. |
| `total` | integer | Total number of doctor records returned in the `data` array. |
| `data` | array | List of doctor objects matching the search criteria. |

#### Doctor Object (`data[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | integer | Unique identifier of the doctor. |
| `name` | string | Full name of the doctor (e.g., `"Dr. Amarnath Chakraborty"`). |
| `profile_image` | string | URL to the doctor's profile image. |
| `experience` | integer | Years of professional experience. |
| `app_url` | string | Deep link URL for the mobile app (may be empty). |
| `web_url` | string | Web URL for booking an appointment with this doctor. |
| `specialities` | array | List of speciality objects, each with `id` (integer) and `name` (string). |
| `speciality_names` | string | Comma-separated string of speciality names for quick display. |
| `availability_status` | string | Current availability status (e.g., `"upcoming"`, `"available"`). |
| `next_available_date` | string | Date of the next available appointment slot (`YYYY-MM-DD` format). |
| `next_available_time` | string | Start time of the next available slot (12-hour format, e.g., `"01:00 PM"`). |
| `next_available_slot` | string | Full time range of the next available slot (e.g., `"01:00 PM - 03:00 PM"`). |

**Example Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Chatbot doctor list fetched successfully",
  "keyword": "medicine",
  "total": 2,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 28,
      "name": "Dr. Amarnath Chakraborty",
      "profile_image": "https://app.peerlessgjct.co.in/uploads/39/Dr-Amarnath-Chakraborty.png",
      "experience": 20,
      "app_url": "",
      "web_url": "https://app.peerlessgjct.co.in/doctor-appointment/28",
      "specialities": [{ "id": 2, "name": "General Medicine" }],
      "speciality_names": "General Medicine",
      "availability_status": "upcoming",
      "next_available_date": "2026-06-17",
      "next_available_time": "01:00 PM",
      "next_available_slot": "01:00 PM - 03:00 PM"
    }
  ]
}
```
